parent_claim: ClaimBound public materials can be mapped to selected public-interest open-source funding eligibility activity categories under a frozen manual funding-fit source audit, without claiming funder approval, endorsement, legal eligibility, reviewer acceptance or funding likelihood.

allowed: ClaimBound public materials have a traceable fit-map to selected public-interest open-source funding eligibility activity categories.
The fit-map is checked against an external public eligibility source snapshot and public ClaimBound materials.
The result may be published as a bounded evidence card with explicit limitations.
forbidden: ClaimBound is legally eligible in the final reviewer sense.
ClaimBound is better than every manual review process.
The private submitted application has been fully audited.

claim_list.claim_text: Selected public-interest open-source funding eligibility activity categories can be mapped to public ClaimBound materials.
claim_list.acceptance_gate: PASS only if each selected funding category has both a public source basis and a public ClaimBound material reference.

claim_list.claim_text: The funding-fit check can be published without committing private application text.
claim_list.acceptance_gate: PASS only if raw_payload_committed=false, private application text is excluded, and the public card contains a clear claim boundary.

claim_list.claim_text: The resulting card is a bounded example of ClaimBound discipline for funding-fit self-checking.
claim_list.acceptance_gate: PASS only if the card explains what ClaimBound helps with and what it does not replace.
forbidden_inference: ClaimBound is better than all manual review

source_surface.official_source_url: source identity withheld from public card to avoid implying funder affiliation

candidate_or_method_surface.candidate: ClaimBound public evidence-card workflow and registry discipline
candidate_or_method_surface.method: Manual source-boundary mapping from selected public-interest open-source funding eligibility activity categories to public ClaimBound materials.

selection_surface.selection_rule: Use only public source material sufficient to support a narrow funding-fit mapping.

target_metric.pass_condition: Every selected mapped funding category has a public source basis and a public ClaimBound material reference.

acceptance_gates: No private application text is committed.
Every mapped category is tied to a public source basis.
Every mapped category is tied to public ClaimBound material.
The final evidence card does not claim funder approval, endorsement, legal eligibility or funding likelihood.
proof_surface.decision_rule: Set the card to PASSED_UNDER_PROTOCOL only if all acceptance gates pass; otherwise set BLOCKED_SOURCE, INSUFFICIENT_COVERAGE or NEGATIVE_RESULT_UNDER_PROTOCOL.

non_overlap_boundary.source_boundary: Only the external public eligibility page and public ClaimBound materials are used.
non_overlap_boundary.private_boundary: Private submitted application text is excluded from the public evidence surface.
non_overlap_boundary.decision_boundary: Funding decision, reviewer judgment, legal eligibility and award likelihood are outside the claim.
non_overlap_boundary.time_boundary: Source snapshot and manual mapping are bounded to access date 2026-06-04.

tracks.source_url: source identity withheld from public card to avoid implying funder affiliation

stop_rules.condition: Private application text would be required to support the public claim.
The card claims funder approval, endorsement, legal eligibility or funding likelihood.
stop_rules.action: Stop and change result to NEGATIVE_RESULT_UNDER_PROTOCOL or rewrite claim boundary.

stop_rules.condition: The external eligibility page materially changes after the access date.
stop_rules.action: Create a new verification track instead of silently reusing this result.

stop_rules.condition: No selected funding category can be mapped to public ClaimBound materials.
stop_rules.action: Set family_status to STOPPED and result to NEGATIVE_RESULT_UNDER_PROTOCOL.
